text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono has suffered an injury, so I bring
her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Trainer... I guess I didn't warm up
properly...
choice_data_list: Nonsense. You did your warm-ups perfectly.
Nonsense. You did your warm-ups perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thank you... But please don't look so sad.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
This is nothing! And I always feel better after
having some chanko, so I'll be okay! ☆
choice_data_list: You should still take it easy, though.
You're not pushing yourself too hard, are you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! I guess you can't help but worry about me.
Okay, then. I will!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's go have some chanko! I bet I'll recover
even faster if we have some together. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That day, Hishi Akebono rests up properly and
starts preparing for our next training session.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I must've strained myself a little too
hard...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I knew she was worse off than she let on... We get
her treated that same day, then pause her
workouts for a while afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Watch this! These legs I've trained up with my
sumo stomping aren't just for show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting treated, Hishi Akebono gets right
back into her training with all guns blazing.
